base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_draculas_rib — a pickup_item from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Dracula's Rib — quest body-part #1. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
